warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
10 Plate I Y T
10 Scap Pull Ups
10 Cossack Squats
5 Tempo Banded Squats
15 Empty Bar Squats
0530 Specific Warm Up
10 Scap Pull Ups
10 Scap Push Ups
2 mins on Assault Bike
10 DB Good Morning
Move through each DB variation.
2 Wall Walks or Handstand Holds

strength.name: Back Squat
strength.description:
4x5 | * Elbows to back pocket
* Rib Cage to Pelvis
* Screw feet OUT into the floor | E3MOM 18 mins
BUILD 2 sets
00:00 10 @ 50%
03:00 8 @ 60%
HOLD 4x6
06:00 5 @ 75%
09:00 5 @ 75%
12:00 5 @ 75%
15:00 5 @ 75%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
EMOM x 3
Min 1: 20 Cal Row
Min 2: 20 Dumbell Snatches
MIn 3: 4 Wall Walks
Min 4: Rest
Round 1 Dumbell Snatch
Round 2 DB Hang Clean & Jerk
Round 3 10 x DB Devil Press
@ 22.5/15kg

hypertrophy.reasoning: Back squat and push press dominate quads, shoulders, triceps; row/snatches fatigue shoulders. Target opposing/supporting muscle groups.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 5 at 75 percent. Strength: Push Press, 4 by 5 at 70 percent. Metcon: EMOM. For hypertrophy, focus on back (lats/rhomboids), hamstrings, biceps.
